scripts.kill:5173: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ('Stopped PID ' + $_) } } else { Write-Output 'No process on 5173' }"
scripts.kill:5174: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ('Stopped PID ' + $_) } } else { Write-Output 'No process on 5174' }"
scripts.clean:vite:all: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite' }; if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite-sistema') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite-sistema' }; if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite-public') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite-public' }; Write-Output 'All Vite caches cleaned'"
scripts.clean:vite:sistema: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite' }; if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite-sistema') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite-sistema' }; Write-Output 'Sistema Vite cache cleaned'"
scripts.clean:vite:public: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite' }; if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite-public') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite-public' }; Write-Output 'Public Vite cache cleaned'"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run kill:5173 && npm run clean:vite:sistema && npm run dev -- --force
scripts.dev:sistema:clean: npm run kill:5173 && npm run clean:vite:sistema && npm run dev:sistema -- --force
scripts.dev:public:clean: npm run kill:5174 && npm run clean:vite:public && npm run dev:public -- --force
scripts.dev:all:clean: npm run kill:5173 && npm run kill:5174 && npm run clean:vite:all && start "vite-public" cmd /c "npm run dev:public -- --force" && npm run dev -- --force
